herdr: Package for Animal Greenhouse Gas Emissions and Land Use

herdr-package.Rd

This package provides tools for calculating and analyzing greenhouse gas emissions and land use metrics for animal systems.

Details

For more information, see:

  • GitHub: https://github.com/JuanCBM99/herdr

See also

Useful links:

  • https://juancbm99.github.io/herdr
